svg.text: • 21. Merge Two Sorted Lists — splice into a dummy head
• 23. Merge k Sorted Lists — heap or pairwise merging
• 19. Remove Nth From End — fast / slow with k-step lead
• 876. Middle of Linked List — fast / slow
• 83 / 82. Remove Duplicates I / II — dummy + curr / prev surgery
• 2. Add Two Numbers — digit-by-digit with carry
• 143. Reorder List — find middle, reverse, merge
• 328. Odd Even Linked List — even / odd pointer pair
• 234. Palindrome Linked List — find middle, reverse second half, compare
• 138. Copy List with Random Pointer — interleave or hash map
• 146 / 460. LRU / LFU Cache — doubly linked list + hash map
Master dummy-head and fast/slow; the rest is composition.
